channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Oregon Democrats' gas tax faces backlash, Jeff Merkley now in a fight
item.description: Oregon hasn't elected a Republican senator since 2002, but 83% of voters rejected a gas tax Democrats passed without defending it.

item.title: Meet the 32-year-old who is America's only full-time spelling bee coach, charging up to $180 per hour
item.description: Scott Remer, a highly influential figure in spelling, takes up to 10% of his champions' prize money.

item.title: Fed's inflation fears may be realized as consumer confidence in long-term prices wanes, even among Trump supporters
item.description: "Consumers appear worried that inflation will increase and spread beyond fuel prices, even in the long run."

item.title: Iran and U.S. near agreement on memorandum of understanding to end war, as Tehran says Hormuz is included in talks but nuclear issues are not
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio told journalists in India that “there’s been some progress made” and “there may be news later today.”
